name: development
description: Developer workflow tools for publishing, worktrees, and repo migration utilities.

interface.longDescription: Git worktree, pull request publishing, and repository migration workflows for modern agent standards.
defaultPrompt: Migrate this repo from Claude-specific config to AGENTS/skills standards.
Create a branch, commit smartly scoped changes, push, and open a PR (ask whether draft).
